Inventory on hand is very high (365636 units), and there are 50000 units arriving this month, which combined can easily cover the current order and potential fluctuations. There is no backlog, indicating supply is meeting demand well. Given the lead time of 1 month, and the lack of forecast data, it is prudent to produce close to the current order volume to avoid excess inventory buildup.
